title: Smooth
why_this_song: Smooth by Santana (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Or else forget about it"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Man it's a hot one"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Or else forget about it"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "'Cause you're so smooth"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Let's not forget about it"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: If you would leave it would be a crying shame
In every breath and every word I hear your name callin' me out
Gimme your heart make it real

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "forget" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "forget" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Smooth" was released in 1999. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Smooth" foi lançada em 1999. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
